texts.hit: The {} intones a blasphemy that makes your flesh crawl off your bones.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s vile chant fails to affect you.
texts.critical_hit: The {} completes its ritual and a piece of your soul tears away!
texts.death: The {} collapses, its purpose fulfilled.

texts.hit: The {} giggles and passes through your guard, stabbing with a ghostly shiv.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s translucent blade passes through you without effect.
texts.critical_hit: The {} solidifies its blade inside your stomach!
texts.death: The {} pops like a nightmare upon waking.

texts.hit: The {} swings a scythe of pure darkness that cuts not flesh but future.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s scythe passes through you — you feel a year of your life gone.
texts.critical_hit: The {} cuts through your thread of fate! You feel your death grow closer.
texts.death: The {} crumbles into a pile of black petals.

texts.hit: The {} inhales, and you feel your very self being drawn toward its maw.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s soul-draw tugs at you but fails to pull free.
texts.critical_hit: The {} tears a glowing filament from your chest — a piece of your soul!
texts.death: The {} bursts into a cloud of screaming motes.

texts.hit: The {} points a bony finger and a bolt of pure entropy strikes your chest.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s deathly bolt strikes the wall, ageing the stone.
texts.critical_hit: The {} grabs your soul and pulls — you feel it stretching!
texts.death: The {} crumbles into a heap of dry bones.

texts.hit: The {} gestures, and the air itself ages around you, leathering your skin.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s age-curse washes over you, a decade passing harmlessly.
texts.critical_hit: The {} touches you, and you feel centuries pile onto your bones!
texts.death: The {} crumbles into dust, its phylactery intact elsewhere.

texts.hit: The {} speaks a word of ending, and your flesh begins to slough off.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s death-word passes through you without triggering.
texts.critical_hit: The {} completes the sentence of death — your heart stops for a beat!
texts.death: The {} collapses, its skull cracking with a final sigh.

texts.hit: The {} howls in your face, and you feel a piece of your hope die.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s despairing wail washes over you without effect.
texts.critical_hit: The {} merges with your shadow and whispers your worst fear into your ear!
texts.death: The {} finally finds peace.

texts.hit: The {} hops rigidly forward, arms extended, and its nails puncture your skin.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s rigid hop carries it past you.
texts.critical_hit: The {} sinks its nails into your shoulder and begins draining your qi!
texts.death: The {} crumples into a heap of burial silks.

texts.hit: The {} seizes you by the throat with an unbreakable grip.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s grasping hands close on empty air.
texts.critical_hit: The {} pins you to the ground, its weight far too heavy for its size!
texts.death: The {} finally releases its hold on the mortal world.

texts.hit: The {} tears at your chest, trying to rip out your soul.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s soul-grasp fails to find purchase on your spirit.
texts.critical_hit: The {} tears a shimmering thread from your chest — you feel lesser for it!
texts.death: The {} crumples, sated at last.

texts.hit: The {} swings a rust-crusted greatsword that shatters on impact, leaving shards in you.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s ancient blade crumbles against the wall beside you.
texts.critical_hit: The {} drives the broken haft of its sword into your chest!
texts.death: The {} falls apart into rust and dry bones.

texts.hit: The {} presses a cold light against your skin, and your flesh begins to translucence.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s baleful light washes over you without effect.
texts.critical_hit: The {} shines through you, and you can see your own bones!
texts.death: The {} gutters out like a spent star.

texts.hit: The {} touches you with a bleeding hand, sharing its ancient wounds.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s stigmata fail to transfer their pain to you.
texts.critical_hit: The {} shows you every wound it died with — and you feel them all!
texts.death: The {} finally ascends.

texts.hit: The {} intones a dirge that vibrates in your bones, causing deep pain.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s chant fails to harmonise with your life-force.
texts.critical_hit: The {} touches your chest and whispers a funeral prayer meant for you!
texts.death: The {} sinks to its knees and completes its own prayer.

texts.hit: The {} wails and tears of blood hit your skin, burning like acid.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s bloody tears splash harmlessly beside you.
texts.critical_hit: The {} sobs onto your face, and the tears eat into your skin like vitriol!
texts.death: The {} cracks apart and crumbles.

texts.hit: The {} splits into a dozen images before one cuts you.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s images flicker and confuse your senses.
texts.critical_hit: The {} surrounds you with a scream from every direction as each image slices you!
texts.death: The {} shatters like a broken mirror.

texts.hit: The {} swings a rust-crusted greatsword that shatters on impact, leaving shards in you.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s ancient blade crumbles against the wall beside you.
texts.critical_hit: The {} drives the broken haft of its sword into your chest — a warrior's final trick!
texts.death: The {} falls apart into rust and dry bones.

texts.hit: The {} swings a rune-etched blade that drinks the warmth from your wound.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s deathly blade whistles past your neck.
texts.critical_hit: The {} runs you through with a blade that glows with stolen life!
texts.death: The {} crumbles, its armour clattering into a heap.

texts.hit: The {} speaks an ancient word of power that ages your skin on contact.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s word of power fails to find its mark.
texts.critical_hit: The {} lays a hand on you and you feel decades pile onto your bones!
texts.death: The {} crumbles into the dust of ages.

texts.hit: The {} snarls and sinks her fangs into your neck, drinking deep.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s pale form moves too fast, overshooting your throat.
texts.critical_hit: The {} pins you down and drains you almost to death!
texts.death: The {} crumbles to ash, hissing.

texts.hit: The {} swings a blade wreathed in shadow that cuts your soul as much as your flesh.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s shadow-blade passes through you, leaving a chill.
texts.critical_hit: The {} opens a wound that won't stop bleeding -- dark magic seals it open!
texts.death: The {} crumples, her dark gifts failing her.

texts.hit: The {} swings a massive cleaver, separating your shield arm from your body -- almost.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s cleaver embeds itself in the floor.
texts.critical_hit: The {} catches you between the ribs with his cleaver!
texts.death: The {} collapses like a felled bear.

texts.hit: The {} cackles and a wave of necrotic energy washes the years from your bones.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s necrotic touch fails to age you.
texts.critical_hit: The {} touches your face and you feel yourself wither!
texts.death: The {} finally stops cackling.

texts.hit: The {} gestures with a crook and flail, and your organs try to rearrange themselves.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s royal curse fails to affect your common blood.
texts.critical_hit: The {} commands your body to obey him -- and part of it does!
texts.death: The {} crumbles into dust and gold.

texts.hit: The {} lunges with a rusty shiv, aiming for your kidneys.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s shiv catches on your belt.
texts.critical_hit: The {} shanks you in the back and twists the blade!
texts.death: The {} drops his shiv and crumples.

texts.hit: The {} bites you with tusks that glow with stolen life.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s orcish blood magic fails to find your vein.
texts.critical_hit: The {} drains your blood and your orcish strength with it!
texts.death: The {} crumbles into a pile of ash and green hide.

texts.hit: The {} swings a funeral bell that rings out your death knell as it hits.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s bell tolls but finds no soul to claim.
texts.critical_hit: The {} wraps you in a shroud and begins the funeral rites over your struggling body!
texts.death: The {} lays down, its final client served.

texts.hit: The {} rustles and slaps you with a broad green leaf.
texts.missed_hit: The {} sways out of reach.
texts.critical_hit: The {} whips you across the face with surprising force!
texts.death: The {} is just a plant again.

texts.hit: The {} rustles and scratches at you with thorny twigs.
texts.missed_hit: The {} sways away from your blow, branches waving.
texts.critical_hit: The {} engulfs you in a mass of sharp twigs and thorns!
texts.death: The {} is just a bush again.

texts.hit: The {} shakes its leaves and peppers you with small, hard berries.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s berry barrage patters against the wall.
texts.critical_hit: The {} catches you in the face with a burst of thorny branches!
texts.death: The {} settles, looking very shrub-like in death.

texts.hit: The {} trembles and launches a single, weak seed at your face.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s seed bounces off the wall behind you.
texts.critical_hit: The {}'s seed catches you in the eye!
texts.death: The {} droops and dies.

texts.hit: The {} pulses and fires a volley of hard seeds into your chest.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s seeds patter against the wall around you.
texts.critical_hit: The {} fires a burst that bruise your ribs through your armour!
texts.death: The {} wilts, its seed pods empty.

texts.hit: The {} lashes at your legs with burning nettle-vines.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s nettles brush against you but fail to take hold.
texts.critical_hit: The {} wraps a nettle vine around your throat and burns your skin!
texts.death: The {} withers away.

texts.hit: The {} flings a volley of razor-sharp thorns at your face.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s thorns embed themselves in the wall behind you.
texts.critical_hit: The {} catches you in the neck with a perfectly aimed thorn!
texts.death: The {} crumples, its thorns falling still.

texts.hit: The {} contracts, forcing a dozen thorns into your legs.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s grasping vines fail to reach you.
texts.critical_hit: The {} wraps around you entirely, a cocoon of thorns!
texts.death: The {} browns and stops moving.

texts.hit: The {} releases a cloud of golden pollen that sears your lungs.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s pollen drifts harmlessly past your face.
texts.critical_hit: The {}'s flower opens to reveal a beam of pure sunlight that burns through you!
texts.death: The {} wilts, its petal falling.

texts.hit: The {} scrapes against you with stone petals, leaving a line of dust.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s stony form grinds the air where your arm was.
texts.critical_hit: The {}'s stone-petal edge finds the soft flesh of your neck!
texts.death: The {} crumbles into fossil dust.

texts.hit: The {} pulses and a beam of concentrated sunlight burns your shoulder.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s light beam sears a line across the floor.
texts.critical_hit: The {} focuses a burning ray through your armour!
texts.death: The {} dims and fades to black.

texts.hit: The {} streaks through the air and impacts you, burning hot.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s trajectory carries it past you, trailing flame.
texts.critical_hit: The {} slams into you like a meteor and explodes!
texts.death: The {} burns out and crumbles.

texts.hit: The {} lashes you with a tendril that leaves a burning welt.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s hell-tendrils thrash the ground around you.
texts.critical_hit: The {} wraps around your leg and its thorns inject hellfire into your veins!
texts.death: The {} shrivels into a blackened stalk.

texts.hit: The {} rustles and crumbles, dust getting in your eyes.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s desiccated form collapses in on itself.
texts.critical_hit: The {}'s last gasp fills your lungs with choking dust!
texts.death: The {} is already mostly dead.

texts.hit: The {} lashes you with a branch that seems to move of its own accord.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s branch-arms thrash but you dodge under them.
texts.critical_hit: The {} forces a root through the stone into your foot, pinning you!
texts.death: The {} dissolves into mulch and leaves.

texts.hit: The {} drives a heavy flanged mace into your ribs.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s mace gouges a chunk out of the wall.
texts.critical_hit: The {} caves in your chest with a brutal overhead strike!
texts.death: The {} crashes to the floor with a clatter.

texts.hit: The {} howls and clamps its hyena-jaws onto your arm.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s jaws snap shut where your leg was.
texts.critical_hit: The {} latches onto your face, shaking its head, tearing!
texts.death: The {} slumps, its jaws finally releasing.

texts.hit: The {} cackles as it opens a vein with its fingernails, cursing you.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s blood curse splashes off your aura.
texts.critical_hit: The {} smears you with its own blood and your skin begins to rot!
texts.death: The {} collapses, its curse breaking.

texts.hit: The {} snaps orders and lands a precise spear-thrust in your thigh.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s spear-point glances off your greave.
texts.critical_hit: The {} co-ordinates a flanking manoeuvre that puts a spear in your back!
texts.death: The {} falls mid-order.

texts.hit: The {} darts out, slashing at your coin pouch and your hand.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s blade cuts your purse strings but misses your flesh.
texts.critical_hit: The {} hamstrings you with a dirty low blow!
texts.death: The {} drops its stolen goods and crumples.

texts.hit: The {} completes a summoning, and a small demon appears to bite you.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s summoning circle fizzles, the demon refusing to manifest.
texts.critical_hit: The {} sacrifices a companion to empower a demon that tears into you!
texts.death: The {} is dragged into its own summoning circle.

texts.hit: The {} hurls a lit fuse bundle that explodes against your shield.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s bomb bounces past you and detonates harmlessly.
texts.critical_hit: The {} plants a satchel charge on your back and detonates it!
texts.death: The {} is caught in its own blast.

texts.hit: The {} stomps and a spike of stone erupts from the floor at your feet.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s stone spike punches through the floor — beside you.
texts.critical_hit: The {} raises a wall of stone that slams you against the ceiling!
texts.death: The {} is crushed by its own golem.

texts.hit: The {} gestures at its fallen kin, and it rises as a stitched horror that claws you.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s flesh-golem fails to animate properly.
texts.critical_hit: The {} stitches a piece of your own skin onto its golem, and you feel it!
texts.death: The {} and its creations collapse together.

texts.hit: The {} charges, letting out a war cry, and drives a spear into your stomach.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s spear skids off your armour.
texts.critical_hit: The {} tackles you and drives its dagger into the gap at your armpit!
texts.death: The {} falls, still reaching for its weapon.

texts.hit: The {} prays and a wave of dark energy washes over you, weakening your bones.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s prayer fails to reach its violent god.
texts.critical_hit: The {} calls a curse that turns your blood to tar!
texts.death: The {} is answered — but not kindly.

texts.hit: The {} calls down a beam of bloody light that boils your skin.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s divine beam scorches you but fails to take hold.
texts.critical_hit: The {} rips out its own heart and offers it — your blood tries to follow!
texts.death: The {} crumples, its god's attention elsewhere.

texts.hit: The {} gestures and a bolt of green flame strikes you in the chest.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s flame-bolt sizzles past your shoulder.
texts.critical_hit: The {}'s eyes glow as it unleashes a torrent of fire that engulfs you!
texts.death: The {}'s magic gouts out and it falls.

texts.hit: The {} rides down on a war boar, its lance catching you in the hip.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s lance strikes sparks from the floor beside you.
texts.critical_hit: The {} bowls you over and its boar tramples you as the knight stabs down!
texts.death: The {} and its mount collapse in a heap.

texts.hit: The {} speaks a syllable of power and your armour grows hot, branding you.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s syllable misfires, heating only the air.
texts.critical_hit: The {} transfigures your weapon into a snake that bites you!
texts.death: The {} combusts in a fit of magical feedback.

texts.hit: The {} bellows and cleaves at you with a massive greataxe.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s axe embeds itself in the floor where you dodged.
texts.critical_hit: The {} splits your shield in half and the follow-up opens your chest!
texts.death: The {} sinks to its knees, still gripping its axe.

texts.hit: The {} charges past on a giant bat, its spear dragging across your ribs.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s mount swerves, its spear passing where you were.
texts.critical_hit: The {}'s bat latches onto your face while the rider stabs you!
texts.death: The {} and mount crash together in a tangle.

texts.hit: The {} swings a sturdy sword with workmanlike efficiency.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s well-aimed strike misses by a fraction.
texts.critical_hit: The {} lands a textbook-perfect thrust through your guard!
texts.death: The {} falls with a sigh.

texts.hit: The {} drives a heavy pick into your foot, pinning you.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s pick gouges sparks from the stone beside you.
texts.critical_hit: The {} headbutts you in the groin before driving its pick into your stomach!
texts.death: The {} crashes down like a rockslide.

texts.hit: The {} moves with fluid grace and scores a shallow cut across your arm.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s elegant strike misses by design — it was a feint.
texts.critical_hit: The {} lands a series of lightning-fast cuts that leave you bleeding from six wounds!
texts.death: The {} crumples, a sad end to a long life.

texts.hit: The {} one-handedly swings a longsword into your side.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s sword bangs off your shield, jarring your arm.
texts.critical_hit: The {} beats your guard down and puts the point through your shoulder!
texts.death: The {} collapses in a clatter of plate armour.

texts.hit: The {} smashes you with a staff wreathed in fire, leaving a bruise and a burn.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s staff-swing and accompanying spell fizzle.
texts.critical_hit: The {} spells your name in fire across your chest!
texts.death: The {} falls, its magic fading.

texts.hit: The {} mutters a curse that makes your own shadow attack you.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s hex bounces off your aura.
texts.critical_hit: The {} turns your blood into spiders that burrow out!
texts.death: The {} chokes on its own hex.

texts.hit: The {} draws a sigil in the air that explodes in a burst of arcane shards.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s sigil shatters harmlessly against the air.
texts.critical_hit: The {} completes a complex spell that detonates inside your skull!
texts.death: The {} falls, its grimoire pages scattering.

texts.hit: The {} whispers a secret so foul it makes your nose bleed.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s secret fails to affect your ignorant mind.
texts.critical_hit: The {} tells you the truth of the universe — your mind buckles!
texts.death: The {} slumps, its forbidden knowledge dying with it.

texts.hit: The {} gestures and a corpse near you rises and claws your back.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s reanimation spell fails to find a suitable vessel.
texts.critical_hit: The {} reaches into your chest and tries to animate YOUR heart while it beats!
texts.death: The {} is dragged into the grave by the spirits it wronged.

texts.hit: The {} charges, sword wreathed in green hellfire, and skewers your shoulder.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s hellfire blade misses, leaving a trail of stinking smoke.
texts.critical_hit: The {} buries the flaming blade in your gut — your blood boils!
texts.death: The {} crumples, its infernal pact broken.

texts.hit: The {} slams a tower shield into you and stabs around it.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s shield bash misses, throwing it off balance.
texts.critical_hit: The {} pins you against the wall with its shield and drives a sword through you!
texts.death: The {} topples, shield clattering.

texts.hit: The {} swings a massive polearm in a wide arc that catches your midsection.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s polearm sweeps over your ducking head.
texts.critical_hit: The {} hooks your ankle with the polearm and brings the blade down on you!
texts.death: The {} crashes to the stone floor.

texts.hit: The {} moves with ancient precision, striking your vital points with a baton.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s baton strike misses, its accuracy diminished by age.
texts.critical_hit: The {} lands a nerve strike that paralyses your arm before the killing blow!
texts.death: The {} finally rests.

texts.hit: The {} chants in unison with itself, summoning chains of force that bind and crush you.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s summoning fails as the chains dissipate.
texts.critical_hit: The {} binds you in force-chains and crushes them until your ribs crack!
texts.death: The {} goes silent, its magic spent.

texts.hit: The {} touches you, and your skin begins to petrify, turning to grey stone.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s preservation touch only stiffens your muscles momentarily.
texts.critical_hit: The {} turns your leg to stone below the knee!
texts.death: The {} crumbles into a marble statue.

texts.hit: The {} deploys a clockwork spider that skitters up your leg and explodes.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s spider-bot malfunctions and rolls in circles.
texts.critical_hit: The {} attaches a device to your chest that begins counting down — and it's not a bluff!
texts.death: The {} powers down, clockwork winding to a stop.

texts.hit: The {} exhales a cloud of absolute cold that freezes your arm solid.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s frost breath leaves rime on your armour but misses your skin.
texts.critical_hit: The {} freezes the air in your lungs — you cough ice!
texts.death: The {} shatters like an ice sculpture.

texts.hit: The {} slams both fists together, and the shockwave throws you into the wall.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s thunderclap deafens you but otherwise misses.
texts.critical_hit: The {} grabs you and headbutts you with enough force to crack stone!
texts.death: The {} collapses with a sound like crumbling masonry.

texts.hit: The {} whistles and a pack of iron hounds swarm you, biting your legs.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s mechanical pack veers off, confused.
texts.critical_hit: The {} sets all three hounds on you — one on each limb!
texts.death: The {} slumps, its pack powering down.

texts.hit: The {} strikes with the discipline of an empire, a precise thrust to your throat.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s disciplined strike passes through your afterimage.
texts.critical_hit: The {} executes a flawless combination — disarm, gut, decapitate!
texts.death: The {} stands at attention even as it falls.

texts.hit: The {} swings a shock-maul that crackles with energy, connecting with your chest.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s maul sparks against the wall beside you.
texts.critical_hit: The {} catches you in the gut with the maul and the electrical shock paralyses you momentarily!
texts.death: The {} deactivates with a whine.

texts.hit: The {} preaches a sermon of entropy, and your equipment begins to decay.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s words of decay fail to take root.
texts.critical_hit: The {} touches you and your armour rusts, your flesh withers, your hair falls out!
texts.death: The {} finally stops preaching.

texts.hit: The {} laughs and a nether-bolt tears through your shoulder, leaving a smoky hole.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s nether-bolt passes through you, taking only your energy.
texts.critical_hit: The {} tears a hole in reality and pushes your head through it!
texts.death: The {} is consumed by the void it served.

texts.hit: The {} summons a storm cloud above you that strikes you with lightning.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s cloud drifts overhead, lightning grounding elsewhere.
texts.critical_hit: The {} traps you in a storm's eye — lightning strikes from every angle!
texts.death: The {} falls, the storm dissipating.

texts.hit: The {} roars and throws you across the room with a flick of his wrist.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s casual swipe misses, but the wind pressure is immense.
texts.critical_hit: The {} catches you mid-leap and drives you into the ground like a nail!
texts.death: The {} stumbles back, finally spent.

texts.hit: The {} punches the ground, and a wave of stone carries you into the ceiling.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s earth-wave passes under you, throwing you off balance.
texts.critical_hit: The {} closes his fist and the stone floor folds around you, crushing!
texts.death: The {} sinks into the earth he commanded.

texts.hit: The {} cackles and a swarm of angry marsh-flies fills your eyes and mouth.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s hex is lost on the wind.
texts.critical_hit: The {} whispers to the bog itself, and it reaches up to drag you under!
texts.death: The {} dissolves into marsh-gas.

texts.hit: The {} weaves silk at impossible speed, entangling your arm before biting it.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s silk stream misses, sticking to the wall.
texts.critical_hit: The {} wraps you in a cocoon from head to toe, then bites through the silk!
texts.death: The {} curls up, her children emerging to devour her.

texts.hit: The {} shrieks and a tide of hatchlings swarms over you, biting everywhere.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s brood scatters, unable to find you through the confusion.
texts.critical_hit: The {} lays eggs in the wound she opened — you feel them moving!
texts.death: The {} collapses, her brood turning on her.

texts.hit: The {} plucks a thread from the air, and the wound on your arm widens.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s thread-plucking misses its connection to you.
texts.critical_hit: The {} unravels the fabric of your armour and skin alike!
texts.death: The {} unravels completely, becoming static.

texts.hit: The {} charges unstoppably, pounding through you like a battering ram.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s charge smashes through the wall where you dodged.
texts.critical_hit: The {} crushes you against the far wall and keeps pushing!
texts.death: The {} grinds to a halt and topples.

texts.hit: The {} poses a riddle as it strikes, confusing you as its claws connect.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s riddle distracts, but its claws miss.
texts.critical_hit: The {} asks a riddle you cannot answer — and the penalty is a claw across the throat!
texts.death: The {} finally rests.

texts.hit: The {} strikes you with a branch wrought from ancient hate, and you feel centuries of pain.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s ancient bough misses, tearing up the earth.
texts.critical_hit: The {} impales you on a root that grows from your own blood!
texts.death: The {} collapses into a mound of earth and leaves.

texts.hit: The {} gapes open and the space around you distorts, tearing your skin.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s gravitational pull yanks at you but fails to tear.
texts.critical_hit: The {} bends space around your arm — it exists in two places, both bleeding!
texts.death: The {} closes with a final, silent pop.

texts.hit: The {} crashes into you, the raw magic of it burning your flesh.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s magical form passes around you like water.
texts.critical_hit: The {} enters your body and begins rewriting your magical signature from within!
texts.death: The {} dissipates into motes of fading light.

texts.hit: The {} streaks across the room and impacts you with celestial force.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s trajectory takes it through the wall.
texts.critical_hit: The {} hits you dead centre, and you're briefly made of light!
texts.death: The {} burns out spectacularly.

texts.hit: The {} strikes you with a blow that resonates with divine power — your soul shivers.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s divine strike levels the area behind you.
texts.critical_hit: The {} touches your forehead and you experience a fraction of its divine domain — it breaks you!
texts.death: The {} withdraws from this mortal coil.

texts.hit: The {} lashes out with claws that are too long, too sharp, too wrong.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s malformed limbs flail wildly.
texts.critical_hit: The {} grows a third arm mid-swing and catches you from an unexpected angle!
texts.death: The {} melts into a pool of ichor.

texts.hit: The {} wields a living blade that screams as it cuts you.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s screaming blade misses, its wail disorienting but harmless.
texts.critical_hit: The {} shields your attack with its own flesh and retaliates with its scream-sword!
texts.death: The {} and its blade scream together before falling silent.

texts.hit: The {} touches you, and your thoughts curdle into violence against your allies.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s corrupting touch fails to penetrate your will.
texts.critical_hit: The {} forces a vision so vile you vomit — and it attacks while you're retching!
texts.death: The {} is consumed by its own corruption.

texts.hit: The {} reads your soul like a book and annotates it with claws on your skin.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s soul-reading fails to find anything interesting.
texts.critical_hit: The {} tears a page from your soul — you forget your own mother's face!
texts.death: The {} crumbles, its research incomplete.

texts.hit: The {} gestures and gravity doubles, pressing you to the floor.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s gravity manipulation fails to catch you.
texts.critical_hit: The {} inverts gravity for you alone — you fall UP into the ceiling!
texts.death: The {} unbinds, reality sighing in relief.

texts.hit: The {} slams you with a fist of solid ice, frost cracking your skin.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s ice-fist shatters against the wall.
texts.critical_hit: The {} breathes a cloud of absolute cold that freezes your blood solid!
texts.death: The {} collapses into a pile of slush.

texts.hit: The {} plummets from above, catching you with talons the size of swords.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s dive-bomb catches only air.
texts.critical_hit: The {} carries you into the sky before dropping you!
texts.death: The {} crashes into the ground.

texts.hit: The {} strikes with both claw and question, and you answer incorrectly.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s riddle-strike confuses you both.
texts.critical_hit: The {} asks a question to which the answer is your death!
texts.death: The {} crumbles into sand.

texts.hit: The {} immolates, and the explosion catches you, but it reforms and attacks again!
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s flame burst misses, sparing you its cycle.
texts.critical_hit: The {} suicide-bombs you with its death-flare!
texts.death: The {} burns to ash — but the cycle continues elsewhere.

texts.hit: The {} surges from the water, jaws gaping, and clamps onto your leg.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s ambush fails as you leap back.
texts.critical_hit: The {} drags you into the water and holds you under!
texts.death: The {} sinks beneath the surface, lifeless.

texts.hit: The {} swings a bronze khopesh with the precision of eternal practice.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s ancient blade scrapes your guard.
texts.critical_hit: The {} performs a death ritual as it cuts you — each wound has meaning!
texts.death: The {} crumbles into dust and ritual purpose.

texts.hit: The {} burrows into your pack and emerges to bite your neck.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s burrowing path misses your skin.
texts.critical_hit: The {} crawls into your ear and begins to eat inward!
texts.death: The {} curls up and dies.

texts.hit: The {} swoops and splashes you with corrosive stomach acid.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s acid splashes the ground, hissing.
texts.critical_hit: The {} vomits acid onto your face — the smell is worse than the burn!
texts.death: The {} dissolves into a pool of its own making.

texts.hit: The {} hurls a volley of crystal shards that embed in your arm.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s shards shatter against the wall.
texts.critical_hit: The {} drives a crystal shard through your hand and it grows roots!
texts.death: The {} shatters into a thousand pieces.

texts.hit: The {} bites you, and the wound simply ceases to exist — along with the flesh.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s bite passes through you into another dimension.
texts.critical_hit: The {} takes a chunk of your arm into non-existence!
texts.death: The {} fades into nothing, still chewing.

texts.hit: The {} swings its sting-tail over its body and drives it into your chest.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s tail strikes the ground, burrowing deep.
texts.critical_hit: The {} catches you between its horns and stings you repeatedly!
texts.death: The {} topples, tail twitching.

texts.hit: The {} shuffles forward on root-feet and brushes spores on you.

texts.critical_hit: The {} collapses onto you, releasing a cloud of choking spores!
texts.death: The {} settles into stillness.

texts.hit: The {} swings a massive iron club in a devastating arc that crushes your shoulder.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s club demolishes the ground beside you.
texts.critical_hit: The {} caves in your ribs with a brutal two-handed swing!
texts.death: The {} crashes to the ground with a thunderous impact.

texts.hit: The {} bites your ankle with mandibles that shear through leather.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s mandibles click shut on a fold of your trousers.
texts.critical_hit: The {} hoists you overhead and brings you down on its knee!
texts.death: The {} curls up and stops moving.

texts.hit: The {} wraps three tentacles around your leg and squeezes.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s tentacles slap the floor around you.
texts.critical_hit: The {} thrusts a tentacle through the visor of your helm!
texts.death: The {} goes limp, tentacles uncoiling.

texts.hit: The {} croaks and lashes you with a long, sticky tongue that burns.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s tongue falls short, retracting with a wet sound.
texts.critical_hit: The {} wraps its tongue around your throat and squeezes while poison seeps in!
texts.death: The {} collapses, deflating slightly.

texts.hit: The {} bumps into you with the force of a nightmare.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s woolly form passes through you like smoke.
texts.critical_hit: The {} charges through your chest, leaving a trail of cold dread!
texts.death: The {} dissolves into a waking dream.

texts.hit: The {} dances around you, leaving trails of cold flame on your skin.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s flames flicker and die before reaching you.
texts.critical_hit: The {} engulfs your head in a silent, freezing blaze!
texts.death: The {} gutter out like a spent candle.

texts.hit: The {} rolls and hurls crystal quills into your chest.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s quills stick into the floor around you.
texts.critical_hit: The {} fires a concentrated burst of quills that pins your cloak to the wall!
texts.death: The {} shatters into crystal shards.

texts.hit: The {} whispers obscenities that manifest as biting flies on your skin.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s vile words fail to manifest.
texts.critical_hit: The {} speaks a word so foul reality rejects it — the backlash tears you!
texts.death: The {} finally shuts up.

texts.hit: The {} reaches out with a stony hand that moves surprisingly fast.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s slow-looking hand is deceptively fast — but still misses.
texts.critical_hit: The {} grabs your head in one hand and begins to squeeze!
texts.death: The {} crumbles into a hill of rocks.

texts.hit: The {} sweeps you with ash-and-pollen wings that choke and burn.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s ash cloud disperses before reaching you.
texts.critical_hit: The {} smothers your face with its dusty wings, ash filling your throat!
texts.death: The {} crumbles into ash and pollen.

texts.hit: The {} crumbles against you, leaving salt in your wounds.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s salt-spray misses, crystallising on the floor.
texts.critical_hit: The {} collides with you and dissolves into your wounds, salting them!
texts.death: The {} scatters into a pile of salt.

texts.hit: The {} lunges, rib-like bars spreading wide to envelop you.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s cage-maw clangs shut on empty space.
texts.critical_hit: The {} slams shut around you, ribs piercing your sides as it squeezes!
texts.death: The {} collapses into inert meat.

texts.hit: The {} touches you, and you forget how to breathe for a moment.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s cognitive grasp fails to find purchase.
texts.critical_hit: The {} erases the part of your brain that controls your left hand!
texts.death: The {} collapses, mind blank.

texts.hit: The {} — a flying severed head — shrieks and bites your shoulder.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s ears flap as it swoops past, grotesque and clumsy.
texts.critical_hit: The {} latches onto your face and peels at your skin with its teeth!
texts.death: The {} tumbles to the ground and lies still.

texts.hit: The {} shifts into a perfect copy of you and attacks with your own moves.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s shifting form can't settle on an effective attack.
texts.critical_hit: The {} becomes you from an hour ago — and tells you everything you're about to do!
texts.death: The {} dissolves into a pool of protoplasm.

texts.hit: The {} slams you with stone wings that leave deep bruises.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s stone wing scrapes sparks from the wall.
texts.critical_hit: The {} latches onto your back and its stone weight presses you to the floor!
texts.death: The {} crumbles into a heap of masonry.

texts.hit: The {} swings a stone greatsword with the weight of a collapsing wall.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s stone blade shatters the floor beside you.
texts.critical_hit: The {} batters you with shield and sword — both made of solid rock!
texts.death: The {} collapses into rubble.

texts.hit: The {} slams you with a fist of liquid rock that hardens on contact.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s magma fist splashes past you.
texts.critical_hit: The {} grabs your arm and the heat melts through your armour!
texts.death: The {} cools into a grotesque statue.

texts.hit: The {} lurches forward with too many limbs and half of them hit you.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s chaotic flailing luckily misses you.
texts.critical_hit: The {} wraps three limbs around you while a fourth grows and punches through!
texts.death: The {} collapses, limbs still twitching.

texts.hit: The {} shrieks and moves faster than a thing that ugly should — claws everywhere!
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s blur of limbs misses as you backpedal furiously.
texts.critical_hit: The {} gets inside your guard and all six claws find soft spots!
texts.death: The {} finally stops twitching.

texts.hit: The {} gibbers and scratches at your boots, surprisingly sharp.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s tiny claws skitter across your greaves.
texts.critical_hit: The {} leaps onto your face and doesn't let go, claws digging into your scalp!
texts.death: The {} lies still, still wrong-looking.

texts.hit: The {} crushes at you with mis-shapen limbs that end in wrong places.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s chaotic attack pattern somehow misses.
texts.critical_hit: The {} absorbs you into its mass, and you feel yourself dissolving!
texts.death: The {} deflates into a pile of miscellany.

texts.hit: The {} thrashes wildly, and a flailing limb catches you in the chest.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s blind thrashing fails to connect.
texts.critical_hit: The {} wraps itself around you, all its surfaces clawed and rasping!
texts.death: The {} stops thrashing forever.

texts.hit: The {} glows with impossible light that burns your eyes in their sockets.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s light flares but you shield your eyes in time.
texts.critical_hit: The {} reveals its true geometry and your mind recoils, causing physical damage!
texts.death: The {} collapses into itself.

texts.hit: The {} flows forward, dissolving everything it touches — including your skin.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s dissolving tide recedes before reaching you.
texts.critical_hit: The {} engulfs your lower body and you feel yourself turning to slurry!
texts.death: The {} evaporates into a sterile mist.

texts.hit: The {} exhales a plume of draconic breath that washes over you.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s breath catches only air.
texts.critical_hit: The {} grips you with clawed hands and breathes directly into your face!
texts.death: The {} collapses, its draconic blood steaming on the floor.

texts.hit: The {} tears at you with claws that drip corrosive acid.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s acid claws score the wall behind you.
texts.critical_hit: The {} spits a glob of acid into your eyes!
texts.death: The {} melts into a pool of acid.

texts.hit: The {} spits a glob of sticky, electrified spittle that shocks your arm.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s electric spit lands on the floor, sparking.
texts.critical_hit: The {} forces a bolt of electricity through your metal armour!
texts.death: The {} collapses, electricity grounding out.

texts.hit: The {} exhales a cloud of venomous gas that seeps into your lungs.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s poison breath disperses before reaching you.
texts.critical_hit: The {} holds you in its cloud of venom until you choke!
texts.death: The {} succumbs to its own toxins.

texts.hit: The {} whispers in your mind as it attacks, splitting your focus.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s psychic attack glances off your will.
texts.critical_hit: The {} invades your mind and makes you watch as it tears your own body!
texts.death: The {} goes silent, mental voice fading.

texts.hit: The {} breathes a cone of fire that engulfs your upper body.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s flame jet misses, charring the wall black.
texts.critical_hit: The {} grabs you and holds you in its fiery breath!
texts.death: The {} crumbles into ash and soot.

texts.missed_hit: The {}'s frost breath leaves a trail of ice beside you.
texts.critical_hit: The {} freezes your leg to the floor and then breathes on your face!
texts.death: The {} shatters, frozen from within.

texts.missed_hit: The {}'s reality-bending claws phase through the air.
texts.critical_hit: The {} shifts out of phase, then back in — inside your armour!
texts.death: The {} stabilises into a frozen state.

texts.hit: The {} touches you, and deathly cold spreads from the point of contact.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s deathly touch passes over you without effect.
texts.critical_hit: The {} drains the colour from your arm — it hangs, grey and useless!
texts.death: The {} crumbles into chalky dust.

texts.hit: The {} calls lightning from the ceiling, striking you through your helm.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s lightning scorches a circle around you.
texts.critical_hit: The {} summons a storm that fills the room — lightning strikes you thrice!
texts.death: The {} falls, the storm dying.

texts.hit: The {} delivers a precise, open-palm strike to your chest that stops your heart momentarily.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s palm strike misses, the force of it displacing air.
texts.critical_hit: The {} hits three pressure points in rapid succession — your body rebels!
texts.death: The {} bows once, then falls.

texts.hit: The {} gestures and a beam of pure destruction vaporises part of your shoulder.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s annihilation beam cuts a trench past you.
texts.critical_hit: The {} disintegrates your weapon and half your arm!
texts.death: The {} is consumed by its own power.

texts.hit: The {} rides a drake that bites your leg as the knight spears your chest.

texts.critical_hit: The {}'s drake pins you as the knight drives a lance through your gut!
texts.death: The {} and drake collapse together.

texts.missed_hit: The {}'s flame jet passes wide, melting stone.
texts.critical_hit: The {} breathes fire down your throat as you gasp!
texts.death: The {} burns out from within.

texts.missed_hit: The {}'s teleport misplaces it behind a wall.
texts.critical_hit: The {} blinks into your arms and stabs you six times before you can react!
texts.death: The {} implodes with a squeak.

texts.hit: The {} barrages you with ice shards that chip your armour and freeze your skin.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s ice shards shatter against the wall.
texts.critical_hit: The {} freezes your eyelids shut and then stabs you!
texts.death: The {} melts into a puddle of frost.

texts.hit: The {} crackles with static and shocks you, making your hair stand on end.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s electrical discharge arcs into the floor.
texts.critical_hit: The {} touches you and your muscles lock up from the current!
texts.death: The {} pops like a static-charged bubble.

texts.hit: The {} moans and bats at you with weak, melting hands.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s listless attack fails to connect.
texts.critical_hit: The {} falls onto you, and its corrosive misery eats at your skin!
texts.death: The {} dissolves into a foul puddle.

texts.hit: The {} spits a glob of caustic phlegm onto your arm.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s glob of phlegm misses, hissing on the floor.
texts.critical_hit: The {} vomits a torrent of digestive fluids onto your face!
texts.death: The {} bursts, its diet disagreeing with it.

texts.hit: The {} punches you with a fist of solid iron, denting your armour.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s iron fist craters the wall behind you.
texts.critical_hit: The {} beats you relentlessly with both iron fists!
texts.death: The {} rusts away into a pile of scrap.

texts.missed_hit: The {}'s blade traces a line of fire through the air.
texts.critical_hit: The {} lands three cuts in a V-pattern on your chest — it's signing its name!
texts.death: The {} laughs even as it falls.

texts.hit: The {} swoops and rakes you with burning wing-claws.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s fiery wings leave trails of smoke as you dodge.
texts.critical_hit: The {} engulfs you in its burning wings and squeezes!
texts.death: The {} crashes to the ground, wings smoking.

texts.hit: The {} stabs you with an ice-tipped tail and a fiery claw simultaneously.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s dual-element strike crosses its own arms.
texts.critical_hit: The {} freezes your leg while burning your face at the same time!
texts.death: The {} steams and hisses as it dies.

texts.missed_hit: The {}'s energy sphere detonates harmlessly past you.
texts.critical_hit: The {} teleports the orb inside your armour before it detonates!
texts.death: The {} flares brightly and crumbles to ash.

texts.missed_hit: The {}'s insubstantial form fails to affect you.
texts.critical_hit: The {} enters your lungs through your mouth and reforms, bursting your chest!
texts.death: The {} dissipates into harmless smoke.

texts.hit: The {} strikes you, and the wound festers visibly within seconds.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s tainted claws barely graze you.
texts.critical_hit: The {} opens a wound that begins to rot immediately, maggots spawning!
texts.death: The {} rots away to nothing before it hits the ground.

texts.hit: The {} mutates, growing a new limb that clubs you from an unexpected angle.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s chaotic form fails to produce a functional attack.
texts.critical_hit: The {} turns you briefly into a chaos spawn as well — your own arm attacks you!
texts.death: The {} unravels into random atoms.

texts.hit: The {} charges, hellfire trailing, and tackles you into the wall.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s fiery charge leaves a burning trail but misses you.
texts.critical_hit: The {} pins you down and presses its burning face against yours!
texts.death: The {} explodes in a burst of hellfire.

texts.hit: The {} reaches into your mind and shows you your worst memory — it hurts.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s psychic torment fails to find a foothold.
texts.critical_hit: The {} makes you relive every death you've ever witnessed simultaneously!
texts.death: The {} screams as its own torments consume it.

texts.hit: The {} freezes the air around you, and ice crystals form in your lungs.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s aura of frost fails to penetrate your warmth.
texts.critical_hit: The {} encases you in a block of ice from the waist down!
texts.death: The {} shatters like winter ice.

texts.hit: The {} touches you and you feel every sin you've ever committed — the guilt is crushing.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s judgement fails to find sin enough to harm you.
texts.critical_hit: The {} forces you to relive your worst act — the shame stops your heart!
texts.death: The {} crumbles, its purpose served.

texts.hit: The {} touches your armour and it begins to corrode and flake away.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s rust-touch fails to find metal quickly enough.
texts.critical_hit: The {} breathes a cloud of oxidising gas — your armour crumbles on your body!
texts.death: The {} crumbles into a pile of rust.

texts.missed_hit: The {}'s axe embeds itself in the stone where you stood.
texts.critical_hit: The {} beheads you in a single clean stroke! ... Or would have, if you didn't dodge — it still opens your throat!
texts.death: The {} stands for a moment, then collapses.

texts.hit: The {} exhales a cloud of pale green gas that dissolves your skin.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s death-cloud drifts past you, leaving you untouched.
texts.critical_hit: The {} fills the room with green gas — your lungs begin to liquefy!
texts.death: The {} dissolves into the cloud it created.

texts.hit: The {} howls and a blizzard engulfs you, hail cutting your skin.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s blizzard passes around you without effect.
texts.critical_hit: The {} buries you in a drift of conjured snow and ice!
texts.death: The {} melts into a slushy remains.

texts.missed_hit: The {}'s fire whip cracks the air beside you.

texts.death: The {} explodes into a pillar of fire.

texts.critical_hit: The {} swallows your arm to the shoulder — the acid is unbearable!
texts.death: The {} bursts like a blister.

texts.missed_hit: The {}'s solar flare momentarily blinds but fails to burn.
texts.critical_hit: The {} focuses the light of a star through your body!
texts.death: The {} burns out like a dying sun.

texts.hit: The {} merges with your shadow and attacks you from every dark surface.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s shadow-form fails to lock onto yours.
texts.critical_hit: The {} tears your shadow away from you — the pain is existential!
texts.death: The {} dissolves into the dark.

texts.hit: The {} belches a cloud of brimstone that chokes and burns.

texts.critical_hit: The {} ignites the brimstone cloud around you — you breathe fire!
texts.death: The {} sulkily returns to hell.

texts.hit: The {} breathes a cone of absolute cold that freezes your lungs.

texts.critical_hit: The {} freezes your blood solid from the inside out!
texts.death: The {} shatters into a thousand pieces.

texts.critical_hit: The {} shows you the heat death of the universe — your body obeys!
texts.death: The {} collapses, a dead star.

texts.hit: The {} speaks a binding oath and chains of hellfire wrap around you, burning.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s binding chains fail to manifest fully.
texts.critical_hit: The {} binds your soul to this spot — you cannot move as it tears at you!
texts.death: The {} is dragged to hell by its own oath.

texts.hit: The {} completes a summoning and the demon appears in front of you, attacking.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s summoning fails — the demon demands its payment anyway.
texts.critical_hit: The {} binds a demon into your body — you can feel it clawing from inside!
texts.death: The {} is taken as payment by its own demon.

texts.hit: The {} asks a riddle of hell, and the wrong answer costs you your skin.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s riddle fails to find a clever enough listener.
texts.critical_hit: The {} poses a riddle to which the answer is your soul!
texts.death: The {} crumbles into a pile of sand and bone.

texts.hit: The {} looks at you, and your organs begin to externalise.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s gaze fails to fully comprehend you.
texts.critical_hit: The {} unpeels reality in your direction — your arm is now on the outside!
texts.death: The {} blinks out of existence.

texts.hit: The {} extends a tentacle of pure possibility that overwrites part of your body.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s possibility-tentacle fails to find you probable.
texts.critical_hit: The {} turns your blood into ink and your bones into books!
texts.death: The {} contracts into a singularity.

texts.hit: The {} swings his flaming greatsword, the heat alone scorching your face.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s divine blade carves a canyon in the floor.
texts.critical_hit: The {} speaks your true name and your body tries to un-exist!
texts.death: The {} returns to the inferno that birthed him.

texts.hit: The {} whispers secrets of the deep, and your ears begin to bleed.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s whispers fail to penetrate your sanity.
texts.critical_hit: The {} tells you the true name of the deep — your head splits!
texts.death: The {} sinks back into the deep.

texts.hit: The {} gestures with an iron sceptre, and your bones turn to lead.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s metal-curse fails to affect your flesh.
texts.critical_hit: The {} turns your blood into molten iron!
texts.death: The {} crumbles into a heap of slag.

texts.hit: The {} snaps his fingers and your spine turns to salt.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s curse of salt fails to take effect on your righteous soul.
texts.critical_hit: The {} offers you a deal you cannot refuse — and the penalty is your flesh!
texts.death: The {} returns to his court, defeated but not destroyed.

texts.hit: The {} stomps and the entire floor rises to crush you against the ceiling.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s earth-bending fails to affect the dungeon's ancient stone.
texts.critical_hit: The {} closes the earth around you like a fist!
texts.death: The {} crumbles, returning to the earth that birthed him.

texts.hit: The {} reaches for you with hands that have pulled souls from heroes greater than you.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s death-grasp fails to claim you.
texts.critical_hit: The {} touches your face and you feel the weight of every soul she has claimed!
texts.death: The {} sinks back into the underworld.

texts.hit: The {} charges with three bodies' worth of strength, hitting you thrice.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s triple-charge tangles his own bodies.
texts.critical_hit: The {} lands three simultaneous strikes on three different parts of your body!
texts.death: The {} collapses into three separate corpses.

texts.hit: The {} extends a hand made of shadow, and your heart skips a beat.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s touch of death fails to find your time.
texts.critical_hit: The {} shows you the exact moment of your death — and it's soon!
texts.death: The {} folds its wings and departs.

texts.hit: The {} rewrites reality so that you were always wounded.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s reality-edit fails to overwrite your existence.
texts.critical_hit: The {} makes you remember a wound you never received — but the pain is real!
texts.death: The {} screams as his realm ejects him.

texts.hit: The {} thrusts with a dark lance that glows with malice.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s lance scrapes across your guard.
texts.critical_hit: The {} runs you through with the dark lance, and you feel your shadow grow heavier!
texts.death: The {} crumples, its dark pact expired.

texts.hit: The {} conjures a jet of black fire that burns cold on your skin.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s dark fire sputters and dies before reaching you.
texts.critical_hit: The {} marks you with a rune of immolation — you burst into cold flames!
texts.death: The {} is consumed by its own fire.

texts.hit: The {} chants to a forgotten god and your blood begins to sing — painfully.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s prayer fails to reach its deep listener.
texts.critical_hit: The {} sacrifices your health in the name of something ancient — and it takes!
texts.death: The {} is taken by the deep.

texts.hit: The {} rips open a tiny gate to hell and a demonic finger pokes through into you.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s gate fails to open fully, the demon refusing the call.
texts.critical_hit: The {} opens a gate inside your stomach and a demon crawls out!
texts.death: The {} is pulled into the gate it opened.

texts.hit: The {} charges a sphere of annihilation that brushes your shoulder — it's gone.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s sphere of annihilation drifts past, erasing a wall.
texts.critical_hit: The {} touches you with a sphere of nothing — your arm simply isn't!
texts.death: The {} is erased by its own spell.

texts.hit: The {} speaks a word of deep magic that causes your veins to glow.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s deep word fails to resonate with your shallow soul.
texts.critical_hit: The {} changes your type — you briefly become an elf, and the body rejects itself!
texts.death: The {} crumbles, all its power spent.

texts.hit: The {} touches you and you feel years peel away — backwards into nothing.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s death-touch fails to find your life-thread.
texts.critical_hit: The {} begins the Death-Song, and your body starts to decay while you watch!
texts.death: The {} falls silent, Death claiming its due.

texts.hit: The {} moves in a blur, leaving three shallow cuts across your chest before you react.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s blinding speed fails to draw blood.
texts.critical_hit: The {} executes the Thousand Cuts — and you feel every single one!
texts.death: The {} finally stops moving.

texts.hit: The {} looses an arrow that seems to bend mid-flight, finding your shoulder.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s arrow embeds itself in the wall behind you.
texts.critical_hit: The {} puts an arrow through your eye-slit!
texts.death: The {} slumps, bowstring snapping.

texts.hit: The {} summons a spike of elemental stone from the floor that pierces your foot.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s stone spike punches through the floor beside you.
texts.critical_hit: The {} calls a pillar of elemental flame, ice, and stone to converge on you!
texts.death: The {} falls, its elements dissipating.

texts.hit: The {} fires a well-aimed arrow that takes you in the thigh.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s arrow flies wide, clattering off stone.
texts.critical_hit: The {} puts two arrows into your chest before you can close the distance!
texts.death: The {} drops its bow and crumples.

texts.hit: The {} whips the air into a blade that cuts your cheek.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s air-blade dissipates before reaching you.
texts.critical_hit: The {} collapses the air in your lungs from afar!
texts.death: The {} falls, the wind dying.

texts.hit: The {} gallops past and plants an arrow in your shoulder.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s arrow skips off the wall behind you.
texts.critical_hit: The {} peppers you with three arrows in rapid succession while keeping distance!
texts.death: The {} stumbles and collapses.

texts.hit: The {} charges, spear lowered, and catches you in the gut.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s charge carries it past, spear gouging air.
texts.critical_hit: The {} bowls you over and stamps on your chest before spearing you!
texts.death: The {} crashes to the ground, legs still running.

texts.hit: The {} fires a volley of heavy arrows that bruise through your armour.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s arrows sink into the stone around you.
texts.critical_hit: The {} pins your cloak to the wall with one arrow and puts another through your thigh!
texts.death: The {} collapses, its massive body shaking the floor.

texts.hit: The {} roars orders and lands a punishing arrow in your hip.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s command-and-arrow attack fails to land.
texts.critical_hit: The {} co-ordinates a volley from its squad while putting a bolt through your knee!
texts.death: The {} falls, still barking orders.

texts.hit: The {} smashes you with a club wreathed in magical fire.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s club, trailing spells, misses and gouges the wall.
texts.critical_hit: The {} brains you with the club and then sets you on fire with a word!
texts.death: The {} collapses with a ground-shaking thud.

texts.hit: The {} swings two clubs at once, one catching your ribs, one your hip.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s twin swings cross each other, leaving it open.
texts.critical_hit: The {} clubs you from both sides simultaneously — your ears ring!
texts.death: The {} crashes down like a landslide.

texts.hit: The {} brings its enormous club down in a devastating overhead smash.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s club pulverises the ground where you stood.
texts.critical_hit: The {} catches you full force, and you feel bones break!
texts.death: The {} crashes to the ground, its single eye glazing over.

texts.hit: The {} each head takes a turn, one headbutting you, the other punching.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s four fists swing in a confusing pattern, all missing.
texts.critical_hit: The {} grabs you with both heads' worth of arms and tears!
texts.death: The {} collapses in a heap of two bodies.

texts.hit: The {} hurls a boulder the size of your torso at you.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s boulder crushes the space you just vacated.
texts.critical_hit: The {} flattens you with an open-handed slap like a collapsing cliff!
texts.death: The {} crumbles into a mountain of stone.

texts.hit: The {} swings a blade of living magma that sears the air near you.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s magma blade melts a trench in the floor beside you.
texts.critical_hit: The {} opens your guard and presses the burning blade against your chest!
texts.death: The {} collapses into a pool of cooling magma.

texts.hit: The {} swings an axe of black ice that freezes the air in its path.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s ice axe shatters against the floor.
texts.critical_hit: The {} embeds its axe in your shoulder — frost spreads across your body!
texts.death: The {} shatters into a thousand ice shards.

texts.hit: The {} stamps the ground and you are thrown into the air by the shockwave.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s earth-shaking stomp fails to destabilise you.
texts.critical_hit: The {} catches you mid-air and hurls you into the wall with crushing force!
texts.death: The {} falls like a collapsing mountain.

texts.hit: The {} glides forward with unnatural grace and stabs with a coral spear.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s spear tip scrapes across your armour.
texts.critical_hit: The {} finds a gap in your guard and runs you through with its coral blade!
texts.death: The {} collapses, gasping on the dry stone.

texts.hit: The {} sings a note that vibrates in your blood, making your heart stutter.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s enchanting song fails to affect your coarse ears.
texts.critical_hit: The {} holds a perfect note that cracks your ribs from the inside!
texts.death: The {} falls silent.

texts.hit: The {} coalesces from water and strikes you with a tidal force.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s watery form splashes apart before reforming.
texts.critical_hit: The {} engulfs you in a pressurised sphere of water — you drown standing up!
texts.death: The {} dissolves into a pool of seawater.

texts.hit: The {} thrusts a barbed spear into your gut and pulls back, tearing.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s spear gouges the air where your stomach was.
texts.critical_hit: The {} impales you clean through and lifts you off your feet!
texts.death: The {} slips and falls, its own spear turning against it.

texts.hit: The {} gestures and a blade of pressurised water slices your arm.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s water-blade splashes harmlessly against you.
texts.critical_hit: The {} fills your lungs with conjured water from across the room!
texts.death: The {} collapses, its water elementals dissipating.

texts.hit: The {} hurls a javelin that takes you in the shoulder.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s javelin sticks into the wall beside your head.
texts.critical_hit: The {} puts a javelin through your thigh, pinning you to the ground!
texts.death: The {} slumps, out of ammunition.

texts.hit: The {} swoops down and kicks you in the face with a clawed foot.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s talons rake through your hair.
texts.critical_hit: The {} latches onto your face and peppers you with beak strikes!
texts.death: The {} crashes to the ground, feathers scattering.

texts.hit: The {} lands a precise strike with a curved blade, then retreats.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s blade traces a silver arc that misses your neck.
texts.critical_hit: The {} executes a flawless iaijutsu strike that opens your chest!
texts.death: The {} crumples, its blade clattering.

texts.hit: The {} summons a gust of wind that hurls debris into your face.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s wind-spell scatters dust but you blink it away.
texts.critical_hit: The {} calls lightning from the ceiling through your metal armour!
texts.death: The {} falls, its scrolls scattering.

texts.hit: The {} descends screaming, twin blades carving your shoulders.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s twin swords cross where your neck was.
texts.critical_hit: The {} lands on your back and drives both blades into your shoulders!
texts.death: The {} falls in a tangle of wings and blades.

texts.hit: The {} darts between your legs and stabs up into your thigh.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s tiny blade scratches your boot.
texts.critical_hit: The {} scales your armour and stabs you in the eye!
texts.death: The {} crumples, its stolen finery scattering.

texts.hit: The {} calls roots from the stone to snare your legs and bite them.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s roots fail to penetrate the stone floor.
texts.critical_hit: The {} entangles you in a mass of thorny vines that pierce your skin!
texts.death: The {} withers, its connection to nature severed.

texts.hit: The {} charges on a giant fox, its spear catching you in the ribs.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s mount veers away at the last moment.
texts.critical_hit: The {}'s fox leaps onto you, teeth in your shoulder as the rider stabs!
texts.death: The {} and mount collapse together.

texts.hit: The {} howls and swings a club three times its size into your side.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s oversized club gouges the floor, throwing sparks.
texts.critical_hit: The {} pulverises your guard and the follow-up swing catches your head!
texts.death: The {} finally stops swinging.

texts.hit: The {} bashes you with an iron-bound shield that seems too heavy for it.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s shield charge glances off your guard.
texts.critical_hit: The {} catches you with the shield edge, then stabs around it!
texts.death: The {} drops behind its shield, finally still.

texts.hit: The {} whips a blade of compressed air that cuts your cheek.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s air blade dissipates before reaching you.
texts.critical_hit: The {} collapses the air in your lungs from across the room!
texts.death: The {} falls, the wind dying with it.

texts.hit: The {} prances around you and bleats as it stabs with a small horn.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s horn-tip glances off your armour.
texts.critical_hit: The {} lands a surprisingly painful kick with its cloven hooves!
texts.death: The {} collapses in a heap of fur.

texts.hit: The {} plays a discordant note on his pipes that makes your head throb.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s piping fails to find the right note to harm you.
texts.critical_hit: The {} plays a melody that makes your veins bulge and your heart race dangerously!
texts.death: The {} drops his pipes and falls silent.

texts.hit: The {} lowers its head and charges, catching you in the gut with its horns.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s charge smashes into the wall, embedding its horns.
texts.critical_hit: The {} impales you on its horns and tosses you across the room!
texts.death: The {} sinks to its knees and falls.

texts.hit: The {} swirls around you, striking out with limbs of solidified smoke.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s smoky form evades your counter and reforms elsewhere.
texts.critical_hit: The {} solidifies inside your lungs, and you choke on smoke!
texts.death: The {} dissipates, its vessel gone.

texts.hit: The {} roars and a wave of desert heat blasts your face.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s flame wave rolls over you but fails to ignite.
texts.critical_hit: The {} grabs you and presses your face into its molten core!
texts.death: The {} crumbles into a pile of cinders and ash.

texts.hit: The {} smiles with backward palms and claws your face, leaving mirrored wounds.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s reversed claws pass through your illusion of safety.
texts.critical_hit: The {}'s palm strikes your chest — backwards — and you feel your fate twist!
texts.death: The {} laughs as it dissolves, promising return.

texts.hit: The {} swings a golden censer that fills the air with burning incense and holy wrath.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s censer swings wide, trailing smoke.
texts.critical_hit: The {} calls down a pillar of light that scorches your sins — and your flesh!
texts.death: The {} ascends in a beam of light.

texts.hit: The {} chants and a gaggle of cherubic imps swarm and bite your ankles.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s celestial summons scatter and fail to find their mark.
texts.critical_hit: The {} touches your forehead and you feel divine judgement — it hurts!
texts.death: The {} is received into heaven, leaving only a glow.

texts.hit: The {} moves with mechanical precision, striking your pressure points.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s programmed strike fails to connect.
texts.critical_hit: The {} executes a lethal technique, targeting your throat and kidneys simultaneously!
texts.death: The {} powers down with a soft chime.

texts.hit: The {} swings a too-large weapon with more enthusiasm than skill.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s wild swing spins it halfway around.
texts.critical_hit: The {} connects squarely, and you feel every bit of its desperation!
texts.death: The {} drops its weapon and crumples.

texts.hit: The {} grins through rotten teeth and stabs at your midsection.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s rusty blade catches on a stalagmite, saving you.
texts.critical_hit: The {} giggles as it drives the blade deep into your belly!
texts.death: The {} slumps against the wall with a sigh.

texts.hit: The {} howls and charges, swinging a serrated cleaver.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s cleaver bites deep into the stone floor.
texts.critical_hit: The {} opens a red line across your chest with a savage swing!
texts.death: The {} topples like a felled ox.
